title: Medicine System Profile (Base)
description: Abstract base class for all medicine system profiles. Each profile provides a system-specific interpretation of an HerbalPreparation. A single preparation can have profiles from multiple systems (TCM, Western, Ayurveda).

@id.description: Unique identifier pattern depends on system: tcm/profile/{slug}, western/profile/{slug}, ayurveda/profile/{slug}

profiles.description: The HerbalPreparation that this profile interprets. This is the KEY relationship connecting therapeutic interpretation to botanical substance.

indications.description: What this preparation is used for in this system.

contraindications.description: When NOT to use this preparation.

safetyConsiderations.description: Safety notes specific to this system's perspective.

modernResearch.description: Modern scientific research relevant to this system's use.

_documentation.designPattern: Strategy Pattern - Different systems provide different interpretations of the same HerbalPreparation
_documentation.keyInsight: Profiles are NOT mutually exclusive - a single preparation can have multiple profiles

profiles: tcm/profile/sheng-jiang (TCM interpretation: warm, acrid, releases exterior)
ayurveda/profile/nagara (Ayurveda interpretation: pungent, heating, reduces kapha)
